default_route_action.description: Specifies the default routing behavior for HTTP requests, including policies for CORS, fault injection, retries, and timeout settings. Supports optional backend service configuration and header actions.

default_service.description: Defines the default backend service for HTTP requests if no specific routing rules match. Must be a valid service name string.

default_url_redirect.description: Configures default URL redirection settings, including optional host and path redirects, HTTPS enforcement, and response codes. Requires 'strip_query' as a boolean.
default_url_redirect.type: list(object({host_redirect: optional(string),https_redirect: optional(bool),path_redirect: optional(string),prefix_redirect: optional(string),redirect_response_code: optional(string),strip_query: bool}))

description.description: Provides a textual description for the resource, aiding in identification and understanding of its purpose. Accepts any string value.

header_action.description: Specifies actions on HTTP headers, including adding, removing, or replacing request and response headers. Must include header names and values.
header_action.type: list(object({request_headers_to_remove: optional(list(string)),response_headers_to_remove: optional(list(string)),request_headers_to_add: list(object({header_name: string,header_value: string,replace: bool})),response_headers_to_add: list(object({header_name: string,header_value: string,replace: bool}))}))

host_rule.description: Defines a rule for directing traffic based on host names and associated path matchers. Requires a list of hosts and a path matcher identifier.

name.description: Specifies the resource name, which must be unique within the project. Cannot be null.

path_matcher.description: Defines a set of routing rules based on URL path patterns, including default services, route actions, and URL redirects. Requires a unique name.

project.description: Indicates the GCP project ID where resources are managed. Should be a valid, existing project ID.

test.description: Defines test cases for validating service configurations, including required host, path, and service parameters.

timeouts.description: Sets custom timeout durations for create, update, and delete operations, defined in a string format (e.g., '30m').
